hero.mastheadSub: People post short concerns. Those turn into yes/no questions. Everyone sees the counts.
hero.leadBody: Open the shared group, pick a question, and vote — or write your own concern in plain language.
hero.inviteSubtitle: Vote yes or no. You can add a concern too — it may merge with similar ones into one question.
hero.leadCaption: You write in plain language. Others vote. Results stay visible for the group.
hero.fieldSub: Visual anchors for what “current” means — meetings, streets, rooms.
hero.editorialSub: Use these when you submit or when you brief a host — they sharpen the story.

fallbackWire.title: Write a concern about something that affects your community
Open the public group and vote on a question

prompts: Say one concern in a single clear sentence.
Who is most affected if nothing changes?
What would change your mind — a fact, a story, or a number?

home.explainerOneLiner: It is a simple tool for groups: write concerns in your own words, vote yes or no on clear questions, and see how the group leans — in one place.
home.explainerStep1: You (or anyone in the group) writes a short concern — like sending a note to the room.
home.explainerStep2: Similar notes are grouped into one question so people are voting on the same thing.
home.explainerStep3: Each question has a yes and a no. Votes and comments stay on that page.
home.getStartedBody: Use the shared public group below, or enter the group name from a link someone sent you.
home.inviteOnlyHint: Some groups only work if you open the invite link you were sent first.
home.createCollapsedHint: Only if you run a team or campaign. Everyone else can use “Jump in” above.
home.myGroupsBody: Shortcuts saved on this browser. Use "Save to My groups" inside a group or on a card below.
home.myGroupsEmpty: No shortcuts yet. Save groups you use often for quick access.
home.createBody: Pick a name and a short URL. You can choose open access or invite-only.
home.createNeedName: Please add a group name and short name for the link.
home.directoryBody: Choose a group to see its questions and votes.
home.openAccess: Open to anyone with the link
home.directoryEmpty: No groups listed yet. Open the public group above or create one.

errors.loadNetwork: We couldn’t load the list. You can still open the public group with “Jump in” above.
errors.createNetwork: We couldn’t reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

spaceActions.inviteNote: This group is invite-only. Open the link you were sent first, then come back here.
